calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion Andm Otion For Judgmnet On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kevin P. Bundy of Shute, Mihaly & Weinberger LLP, 552-7272, appearing for petitioner and moving party
Sharon Duggan, 510-271-0825, appearing for petitioner and moving party

John H. Mattox of Office of the General Counsel for State of California, 916-651-7648, appearing for respondent and opposing party Department of Fish and Game
Robert W. Byrne of Office of the Attorney General for the State of California, 703-5860, appearing for respondent and opposing party Department of Fish and Game

The Court made a personal disclosure, and no objections were made. The matter was argued, and the Court modified it's tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION INFORMATION CENTER, CENTER FOR BIOLOGICAL DIVERSITY, KLAMATH-SISKIYOU WILDLANDS CENTER'S MOtion For Judgmnet On The Pleadings was granted. The Court requested that Mr. Bundy submit a proposed order on or by January 16, 2007. Any comments on the proposed order should be submitted on or by January 23, 2007. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleading On The Pleading;Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kevin P. Bundy of Shute, Mihaly & Weinberger LLP, 552-7272, appearing for petitioner and opposing party
Sharon Duggan, 510-271-0825, appearing for petitioner and opposing party
John H. Mattox of Office of the General Counsel for State of California, 916-651-7648, appearing for respondent and moving party Department of Fish and Game
Robert W. Byrne of Office of the Attorney General for the State of California, 703-5860, appearing for respondent and moving party Department of Fish and Game

The Court made a personal disclosure, and no objections were made. The matter was argued, and the Court modified it's tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF FISH AND GAME'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleading On The Pleading was denied. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
